creator: owen94012@gmail.com
text:
Originally I didn't know that there was the older port, but when creating the PR i saw that it was a previous port titled zipios++ under archivers.

When I was writing this port I had it under sysutils but then I changed it to archivers but I kept off the [++] because I remember seeing somewhere that they wanted to consolidate the name under zipios instead of zipios++

I can't find the link now but I saw that they wanted to get rid of the ++ so I just left it off in this port.
